infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs camera access to capture photos of your travel locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Travel Diary uses your location to automatically detect and record the address where your photo was taken.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Travel Diary needs photo library access to save your travel photos.

plugins.cameraPermission: Travel Diary needs camera access to capture your travel photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Travel Diary uses your location to record where your photos were taken.
